post.description: Log in via OAuth2 and return an access token for future requests.
Validate the current access token and return the authenticated user.
Start password recovery: email a reset link if the account exists.
Reset a password using a valid reset token.
Return the password-recovery email HTML for preview (superuser only).

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of users (superuser only).

post.description: Create a new user (superuser only).

get.description: Return the authenticated user's own profile.

delete.description: Delete the authenticated user's own account.

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's own profile.
Update the authenticated user's own password.

post.description: Register a new user without authentication (public signup).

get.description: Return a user by id (own profile, or any user for superusers).

patch.description: Update a user by id (superuser only).

delete.description: Delete a user by id (superuser only).

post.description: Create a store; the caller becomes its owner (+ subdomain).

Get a store the current user can access.
Return the current user's role and permissions in the active store.
Get the store's settings (requires ``settings.view``).

post.description: Publish the store (status active; requires ``settings.update``).
Pause the store (status paused; requires ``settings.update``).

get.description: List the store's members (requires ``team.view``).

post.description: Invite an existing account user to the store (requires ``team.invite``).

get.description: List the store's products (paginated).

post.description: Create a draft product.

get.description: Get a product by id.

patch.description: Apply a partial update to a product.

delete.description: Delete a product (soft delete: kept in the DB).

post.description: Publish a product (``draft``/``archived`` -> ``published``).
Take a product offline (``-> archived``); reversible via publish.

get.description: List the store's categories (paginated).

post.description: Create a category.

patch.description: Apply a partial update to a category.

get.description: List a product's variants (paginated).

post.description: Create a variant under a product.

patch.description: Apply a partial update to a variant.

get.description: List a product's images (ordered by position).

post.description: Link a media file to a product.

get.description: Return the product's stock entry (None if not set yet).

put.description: Set the stock quantity for a product (optionally a variant).

get.description:
List the global theme templates available to the store.

``store_id`` is consumed by the ``require_permission`` dependency (path); the
templates themselves are global, so the handler does not need it.
Return the store's theme settings (creating a default row if absent).

patch.description: Apply a template and/or edit appearance; invalidates the read caches.

get.description: Return the store's settings as they would look with ``template_id`` active.

post.description:
Upload an image: store the original on S3 and enqueue variant generation.

Args:
    store_id: The active store id from the path.
    session: Active database session.
    file: The uploaded image.
    _perm: Authorization (requires ``catalog.product.update``).
    owner_type: What the media belongs to (default ``product``).

Returns:
    The created media file (status ``processing``).

get.description: Return the signed-in user and their platform roles (empty if not an admin).
List all stores (cross-store), excluding soft-deleted ones.
Get a store's admin detail (identity + settings + members).

post.description: Block a store (status -> ``blocked``); the dashboard guard then bars it.
Unblock a store (status -> ``active``).

get.description: List all account users, excluding soft-deleted ones.
Get an account user by id.

post.description: Issue an access token to act on behalf of a user (recorded).

get.description: List the subscription plan definitions.

post.description: Create a subscription plan definition.

get.description: Get a subscription plan definition by id.
List the registered theme templates.

post.description: Register a theme template (its code must already exist in the storefront).

get.description: Get a registered theme template by id.

post.description: Upload a template's thumbnail to the CDN and link it.

get.description: Return the storefront home for the host's store.
List the store's categories.
List the store's published products (paginated), optionally by category slug.
Return a published product by slug.
Return a published editorial page by slug.

post.description: Send a test email to the given address (superuser only).

get.description: Return ``True`` to confirm the API is reachable.

post.description: Create a new user directly, without authentication (local only).

get.description:
Liveness check confirming the app process is up.

Returns:
    A small JSON payload ``{"status": "ok"}``.

Readiness check for Redis.

PINGs the Redis server; raises (HTTP 500) if it is unreachable.

Returns:
    A small JSON payload ``{"status": "ok"}`` when Redis responds.

MembershipStatus.title: MembershipStatus

MyMembership.title: MyMembership

PlatformMe.title: PlatformMe
PlatformMe.description: The signed-in user and their platform roles (empty if not an admin).

PrivateUserCreate.title: PrivateUserCreate
PrivateUserCreate.description: Request body for creating a user through the private endpoint.

ProductCreate.title: ProductCreate
ProductCreate.description: Fields accepted when creating a product (status starts as ``draft``).

ProductStatus.title: ProductStatus
ProductStatus.description:
Lifecycle status of a catalog product (doc 09).

- ``draft``: never published; editable; the slug follows the name.
- ``published``: live on the storefront; the slug is fixed.
- ``archived``: taken offline but kept — reversible via publish; the slug
  stays reserved.

Deleting a product is a **soft delete** (``deleted_at``), not a status.

ProductUpdate.title: ProductUpdate
ProductUpdate.description: Partial update for a product (unset fields are left unchanged).

ProductVariantStatus.title: ProductVariantStatus
ProductVariantStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a product variant.

StoreAdminDetail.title: StoreAdminDetail
StoreAdminDetail.description:
A store's admin detail: identity + settings + members.

Orders/volume/webhooks/commissions are **not** included here yet — those
modules do not exist in the codebase yet.

StoreAdminListItem.title: StoreAdminListItem
StoreAdminListItem.description: A store as listed in the platform admin (cross-store).

StoreCreate.title: StoreCreate
StoreCreate.description: Payload to create a store. The ``country`` derives currency/locale (P3-LOC-01).

StoreMemberInvite.title: StoreMemberInvite
StoreMemberInvite.description: Payload to invite a member by email with a role.

StoreMemberPublic.title: StoreMemberPublic
StoreMemberPublic.description: A store member as returned via the API.

StoreMemberRoleUpdate.title: StoreMemberRoleUpdate
StoreMemberRoleUpdate.description: Payload to change a member's role.

StorePublic.title: StorePublic
StorePublic.description: Store as returned via the API.

StoreSettingsPublic.title: StoreSettingsPublic
StoreSettingsPublic.description: Store settings as returned via the API.

StoreStatus.title: StoreStatus
StoreStatus.description:
Lifecycle status of a store (doc 09).

- ``draft``: created, not yet published (not served on the storefront).
- ``active``: published/live — the only status the storefront serves.
- ``paused``: taken offline by the merchant (reversible via publish).
- ``suspended``/``blocked``: turned off by the platform admin; the
  dashboard guard blocks access.

Removing a store is a **soft delete** (``deleted_at``), never a status.

StoreThemeSettingsPublic.title: StoreThemeSettingsPublic
StoreThemeSettingsPublic.description: Public representation of a store's theme/appearance settings.

StorefrontCategorySection.title: StorefrontCategorySection
StorefrontCategorySection.description: A category with its first products (templates with category sections).

StorefrontHome.title: StorefrontHome
StorefrontHome.description: The storefront home payload: store identity, active theme and highlights.

StorefrontProduct.title: StorefrontProduct
StorefrontProduct.description: A published product with its images, for storefront cards and detail.

StorefrontTheme.title: StorefrontTheme
StorefrontTheme.description:
Public appearance for rendering (active template + theme fields).

Read-only: a store with no settings yet falls back to the default template
(``classic``) without creating a row.

ThemeTemplatePublic.title: ThemeTemplatePublic

ThemeTemplateUpdate.title: ThemeTemplateUpdate

ThemeUpdate.title: ThemeUpdate
ThemeUpdate.description:
Partial theme update: apply a template and/or edit appearance.

Only the fields actually sent are applied (``exclude_unset``). Setting
``active_template_id`` validates the target is an available template.
